title: cronmc
description: Provides a cron-like functionality for administrators
body: cronmc provides a 'cron'-like capability for your Minecraft server, allowing you to schedule various activities to occur automatically. Please see the wiki for info and usage. cron4j is used in this project and is licensed under the LGPL. All of my work is licensed under the MIT license. Feel free to use this mod in your modpack; I would appreciate a shout-out if you do.
